a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: People in rural areas not using improved sanitation facilities, 2022
Data source: WHO/UNICEF Joint Monitoring Programme for Water Supply, Sanitation and Hygiene (JMP) (2024)
Note: An 'improved sanitation facility' includes flush/pour flush (to piped sewer system, septic tank, pit latrine), ventilated improved pit latrine,
pit latrine with slab, and composting toilet.
